name: Big Soft Almond Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a mixing bowl, cream together butter and sugar until smooth.
3. Add eggs and blend.
4. Add almond filling and milk and blend again.
5. Mix flour, baking soda, and salt in a separate bowl.
6. Add the dry mixture to the creamed mixture.
7. Scoop 2 rounded tablespoons of dough for each cookie.
8. Roll the dough into balls and place on lightly greased cookie sheets, spacing cookies about 2 inches apart.
9. Sprinkle sliced almonds onto the tops of the cookies.
10. Bake until the cookies are lightly golden and firm to the touch, about 15 minutes.
11. Using a spatula, transfer cookies to a rack to cool.
